prompt: A favicon icon, 1024x1024. A terminal cursor (thin vertical bar/line) in bright green (#9ece6a) combined with a small image/photo frame icon, both on a pure black background (#08080c). The cursor is on the left side, the small rectangular frame shape is to its right. Monospace terminal aesthetic — think of a code editor blinking cursor next to a picture icon. Clean, minimal, no gradients, no shading. Must be recognizable at 16x16 pixels. No text, no labels.
